name: Ginger Steamed Dumplings
recipeIngredient: 1 package Garden Sausage (Wholesome & Hearty Foods, Inc.)
a few Chinese style pea pods
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm 4 patties at a time in the microwave for about 30 seconds.
2. Lay out several won ton wrappers.
3. Place a small amount of Garden Sausage (about 6 dumplings per patty) in the center of each wrapper.
4. Sprinkle with powdered ginger and Kikkoman lite soy sauce.
5. Add a slice of Chinese style pea pod to about half of the dumplings for extra flavor.
6. Pinch the won ton wrappers closed at the top.
7. Place the dumplings side by side in a steamer basket over boiling water in a saucepan.
8. Cover and steam for 5+ minutes, or until the wrappers are moist rather than floury.
9. Serve with hot Asian-style mustard and/or light soy sauce on the side.
WARNING: Ensure the rewritten recipe remains strictly accurate to the original. Do not invent ingredients, change quantities, or alter the core cooking instructions.
